subject: Re: Ben Shirazi's BBJ
body:
the boat looks great..performance?,,price.. thanks


----- Original Message ----
From: "lvjet@aol.com" <lvjet@aol.com>
To: JEEPROJECT@YAHOO.COM
Cc: ehanna@nysgmail.com; Zorroranch@aol.com; LVJET@aol.com
Sent: Saturday, April 28, 2007 9:09:33 AM
Subject: Ben Shirazi's BBJ


Jefffey,
Ben Shirazi called me, They have purchased GE's BBJ, it is on their ramp in Fort Laurderdale,
they are maintaining the 2 state rooms and installing new leather and carpet at this time. also Paint.
I believe that GE was asking 52M or close to that when they owned it.   
Toy store is asking 63M. 
would you like pictures of the interior?
 
 
LSJ BOAT:
Web sight below is the 45 foot boat with Pilot house,
Phantom boat is manufactoring a 45 foot with a 11.6 foot beam boat also.
pictured below is the 8.6 foot beam.
 
http://www.phantomboats.com/new/oceanfisherman.html
 
 











 

45' Oceanfisherman
Commercial Pilot House
(Also availabe as a Center Counsel with Custom T-Top or Radar Arch)

(6 Reclining Bucket Seats, Molded In Dash, Rear Cabin Door, Windows, Ventilation Roof Hatches standard - A/C, Heat, Auxiliary Seat Bait Tank Optional)
Gas: 
2 - 370 hp Bravo 1 includes stainless steel prop - one year warranty - upgradeable for additional years
2 - 425 hp Bravo 1 one year warranty - upgradeable for additional years
2 - 500hp EFI's - Bravo I Drive - (rigging/steering upgraded to race grade) one year warranty only
Diesel:
2 - 315hp Yanmars Turbo Diesel Engine with Bravo I - one year warranty
2 - 440 Yanmars Turbo Diesel Engine with B-Max drive (1 year warranty on engine on boats under 15,000 lbs gross weight - Drive is warranted from the Bravo shop )
Drive Upgrades:
Bravo 2 - additional 500.00 (costs associated with changing out the drives and props) per engine
Bravo 3 - additional 700.00 (costs associated with changing out the drives and props) per engine
Speedmaster 5A and 6 - Price on Request
Trailer:
MYCO Custom Aluminum Triple Torsion Axel Trailer with Custom Aluminum Wheels and 6 Wheel Disk/Surge Brakes - Custom Built and Fitted to Phantom's Hull, includes Spare - $15,000
(uses 2 5/16th Ball and Standard Class 5 Hitch)
Trailer Options:
Air or Electric Brakes Available - 5th Wheel Coupler - Goose Neck - Price on Request
Standard Features
Construction:
Balsa Core Composite Construction Utilizing Vinyl Ester Resins and Biaxial Glass Using proprietary Techniques from Our Race Boat Construction Experience including Monocoupe Super Structure Shell 
Plastic Honeycombed Bulkheads and Floors All Tied In On Both Sides 
Hand Laid Fiberglass on all Parts From Hull to Hatches 
Built in PVC Wire Runs for Wiring and Rigging 
Automatic Bilge Pumps (4) 
Private Stand-up Head in Bow Section 
Fiberglass Stringers Foam Filled 
Porta Pottie 
Deck/Gunwales:
Single 300 Gallon Aluminum Fuel Tank and/or twin 150 Gallon Aluminum Fuel Tanks 
Non-skid deck in white gel coat 
10" Stainless Steel Pop Up Deck Cleats 
Flush deck Anchor Locker w/Drain 
Massive Fish Boxes with 2 electric pump outs 
Live Bait Wells (2) Molded in rear corners of deck with high flow Pumps 
Engine Hatch with Electro Mechanical Lifting Device 
Grab Rails - heavy duty Aluminum with billet stantions 
360 Degree Cockpit Coaming Bolsters 
Courtesy Lights (2) 
Rod Holders - Stainless Steel through bolted 
Design Features:
Phantom's Twin Step Internally Vented Hull - Unique to the Industry, Developing Higher Speed and Efficiency with Diesel Power 
Hull and Deck Developed to Allow 360 degree Fishing by Placing Inboard/Outboard Power Under the Floor Without a Hump or Obstruction and High Enough Gunnels to Provide Support and Safety 
Enhanced Stability From Extra Low Center of Gravity Combined With Extra Wide Chine to Chine Width 
Drives are Recessed Under Transom to Allow Classic Inboard Stern Fishing 
Bow Cabin/Storage Allows Versatility through Customization from Full Cabin to Standing Room Head/shower 
Under Floor Spaces Can Be Customized to Customers Needs 
Unlimited Power Train Configurations 
Standard Model Has T top or Arch - Available Also With Custom Pilot House for Commercial/All Weather Operation 
Custom Military versions available with bullet resistant pilot house and other safety features and options - call for details 
One of the Largest Trailerable Configurations Available - 13' 6"Tall x 8' 6" Wide - Under 70'Overall w/Tow Vehicle on Custom MYCO Trailer 
Electrical/
